event: Green alfalfa field with distant farmhouses
description: A neo-impressionist landscape showing a broad expanse of green and yellow-green alfalfa field stretching across the entire canvas. Small dots of red, orange, and yellow flowers are scattered throughout the dense vegetation. In the far distance, barely visible above the field's horizon, white farmhouses and a few trees mark the edge of a village. The sky at the top is rendered in pale yellows and whites. The painting is executed in the characteristic pointillist technique of tiny, regular dots of color creating a shimmering, vibrant surface.
